AC: 6
STR: +5 CHA: +5 AGI: +9
WT: 0.3 Size: SMALL
Class: CLR DRU BRD SHM NEC WIZ MAG ENC
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Worn Cloth Mantle
Lore Item
Slot: SHOULDERS
AC: 6
STR: +5 CHA: +5 AGI: +9
WT: 0.3 Size: SMALL

Stackable:No

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Old Sebilis
NPC Name
a sebilite golem


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Old Sebilis


Uploaded November 27th, 2008
Send a correction
Post Comment
Just Dropped
QuoteReply
# Dec 20 2007 at 9:24 AM Rating: Decent
Narpok
View User Forum
Scholar
342 posts
Never seen this before and I have slaughtered Old Seb over and over farming lillies. I thought it was the mana pres shoulders at first. Dropped off a random golem or frog -- definitely not a named. Gotta be extremely rare considering the number of mobs I've killed.
▲ Page top
New to me.
QuoteReply
# Jul 22 2002 at 8:31 AM Rating: Decent
Yendys
View User Forum
Scholar
90 posts
Never had seen this thing before til it dropped in Chef off golem... *shrug* decent i guess for chanters that dont have shawl 7/8 yet. Needs mana/hp on it to be competition really tho...
____________________________
========================

Sage Yendys / Yendyson
75th Phantasmist/Transcendent
Solusek Ro
Paradigm
▲ Page top
Got a bit lucky
QuoteReply
# May 10 2002 at 12:14 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1618791502835
View User Forum
Guru
400 posts
I'd never even heard of this item (being still fairly new to Norrath), but was wanting an upgrade to the non-magical shoulders I was wearing when I saw a guy auctioning this and an Othmir Fur Cap.

Got there to find he'd sold the cap already, but had a look at the rest of his stuff and this caught my eye. Maybe not the best shoulders for a Druid, but the stat bonuses really leapt out at me. Asked him what he wanted for it (expecting it to be WAY outside my price range!) and he said 250pp! I snapped it up as he explained that he was clearing out bank slots. Talk about being in the right place at the right time. Apparently, the Othmir cap went for 100, wish I'd sprinted over there a bit quicker!

Can't see me swapping these for a while, as I don't think I'd be able to afford an upgrade for a loooong time!
▲ Page top
RE: What drops?
QuoteReply

Anonymous
According to castersrealm drops off a Sebilite Golem. As for price ... they report at 22k !!

Won on a role for one of these today. It dropped off a Sebilite Golem which we killed in the chef room. Our group enchanter said he had better so it was gravied to the group. Luckey me.

#Anonymous, Posted: Apr 30 2001 at 8:48 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Irritating to see so many classes but not the Monk ;) this would be great for a monk.
price?
QuoteReply
# Mar 28 2001 at 8:17 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591757766651
11 posts
any idea what the price on this is? i would imagine that since Guilded Cloth (2ac 5str 9agi) isnt but 1k or so, this wouldnt be too much more. dropping from Sebilis i guess would put a bit of a steeper price tag on it, and the higher ac and cha....
i would imagine that Bards get the most use out of this as they can always use the AC, the Str, Cha, and Agi...but from the lack of int/wis shoulders this wouldnt be bad for the always-encumbered casters.

__DEL__1591768229189

These = chanter shoulders.

I'd pay all 4kpp I have in the bank for these, and given other options available for chanter shoulders, (none) I'd be lucky there's not a better offer from some other chanter looking to buy them...

Oh there are better and much easier to get...
